chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Misc: Application No.S-174 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on office objection (s) 2. For order on M.A No.2799/2025 3. For hearing of main case 27.10.2025 None is present for the applicant. No intimation has been received. It appears from the perusal of the documents available on record that the applicant Bibi Kanwal, had moved an application essentially seeking protection of her fundamental rights, i.e., life and liberty. The Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, vide impugned order dated 20.03.2025, directed the concerned SHO to provide legal protection to the applicant in accordance with law. I have perused the contents of this Criminal Miscellaneous Application filed by the applicant Bibi Kanwal, who had in fact been granted relief by the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace as articulated in her application and I find no legal defect in the impugned order. In particular, no basis has been made out for any relief beyond what was originally prayed for in the application. The impugned order passed by the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace is maintained and once again, as per the said order, the concerned SHO is directed to provide protection to the applicant in accordance with law. The Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed in the above terms. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
